roles.name: Runemaster of Mimir's Well
roles.description: Drinks from the well of wisdom — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and inscribes the runes of architecture.

roles.name: Jarl of the Longship
roles.description: Captains the longship of delivery — sets the oars, holds the rudder, and answers to the High Seat.

roles.name: Keeper of the Sagas
roles.description: Steward of the great sagas of records, layouts, fields, and permission sets.

roles.name: Smith of Svartálfheim
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features in the deep workshops of the dwarves.

roles.name: Master Smith Brokkr
roles.description: Most senior of the Svartálfheim forge — crafts the legendary builds (Mjölnir-tier) under tightest tolerances.

roles.name: Allfather's Right Hand
roles.description: Speaks for Odin in the western halls — sets standards and guides the senior smiths of the realm.

roles.name: Skald of the Mead-Hall
roles.description: Sings the customer's needs into shape — practiced craft at the borders of requirements.

roles.name: Apprentice Skald
roles.description: Learns the verses of discovery and configuration under the elder Skald's eye.

roles.name: Novice Rune-Carver
roles.description: Learns to carve the basic runes of configuration — the youngest of the consulting hall.

roles.name: Bridge-Warden of Bifröst
roles.description: Architect of the rainbow span between Salesforce and the realms beyond — Heimdall's discipline.

roles.name: Builder of the Rainbow Span
roles.description: Lays the planks of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Warden's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Bifröst Builder
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the dwarvish patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of Eir's Hall
roles.description: Tends the wounded code — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the High Seat.

roles.name: Herald of Heimdall's Horn
roles.description: Sounds Gjallarhorn for product and message — leads all marketing craft across the realms.

roles.name: Skald of the War-Banners
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — composes the verses that gather the host.

roles.name: Banner-Bearer of the Einherjar
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily charge.

roles.name: Scribe of Mimir's Counsel
roles.description: Records what is asked and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the runic craft of design.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Hel & the Hero-Sagas — Underworld Analytics Implementation

aesir-asgard.name: Council at Gladsheim
aesir-asgard.description: Discovery sign-off — the twelve seats convened in the high hall.

aesir-asgard.name: Mjölnir Forged
aesir-asgard.description: Build kickoff: the hammer leaves Brokkr's anvil ready for the road.

aesir-asgard.name: Audience at Hliðskjálf
aesir-asgard.description: Mid-project gate: governance review from the Allfather's high seat.

aesir-asgard.name: Idunn's Apples Delivered
aesir-asgard.description: Phase invoice trigger: vitality returned to the host.

aesir-asgard.name: Coronation of the Aesir
aesir-asgard.description: Go-Live: governance plane lit across Asgard.

aesir-asgard.name: Hand-off to Forseti
aesir-asgard.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to the god of justice.

vanir-vanaheim.name: Truce of the Aesir-Vanir
vanir-vanaheim.description: Project kickoff: hostages exchanged, contracts spat into the cauldron.

vanir-vanaheim.name: Skidbladnir Launched
vanir-vanaheim.description: Build phase: the foldable longship sets sail.

vanir-vanaheim.name: Harvest Held
vanir-vanaheim.description: UAT gate: the granaries fill, the Vanir bless the build.

vanir-vanaheim.name: Freyr's Dispensation
vanir-vanaheim.description: Go-Live: prosperity platform broadcasts across Vanaheim.

vanir-vanaheim.name: Return to Folkvangr
vanir-vanaheim.description: Hyper-care close: Freya's host welcomed home.

vanir-vanaheim.name: Tribute to Njord
vanir-vanaheim.description: Final invoice: the sea-father's due is paid.

jotnar-jotunheim.name: Frost Awakens
jotnar-jotunheim.description: Discovery: surveillance plane chills into life.

jotnar-jotunheim.name: Forge the Frost-Stones
jotnar-jotunheim.description: Build: the warning-horn network laid across the citadel.

jotnar-jotunheim.name: Útgarða-Loki's Audit
jotnar-jotunheim.description: Solution review by the trickster-king himself.

jotnar-jotunheim.name: Frost Goes Still
jotnar-jotunheim.description: Project close: surveillance suspended, the giants withdraw.

heroes-and-underworld.name: Council of Hel
heroes-and-underworld.description: Kickoff council in the hall of Éljúðnir.

heroes-and-underworld.name: Gaze into Urd's Well
heroes-and-underworld.description: Discovery: dashboards modelled from the Norns' weave.

heroes-and-underworld.name: Reforge the Sword Gram
heroes-and-underworld.description: Build: the hero's blade re-tempered for the dragon-hunt.

heroes-and-underworld.name: Choosing of the Slain
heroes-and-underworld.description: UAT acceptance: Valkyries select the worthy reports.

heroes-and-underworld.name: Crossing of Gjöll Bridge
heroes-and-underworld.description: Go-Live + handoff: the analytics cross into Helheim.

heroes-and-underworld.name: Final Recompense
heroes-and-underworld.description: Final invoice rendered by Hel herself.

Odin Allfather.notes: Self-sacrifice on Yggdrasil — pre-arranged nine-day vigil.

Thor Odinson.notes: Goat-cart road trip to Jötunheim — no callouts, no exceptions.

Loki Laufeyson.notes: Mysterious absence — investigation pending, mead unaccounted for.

Heimdall.notes: Bifröst maintenance window — hand-off to backup watchman.

Freyr.notes: Visiting Gerðr in Jötunheim — gave up sword, will bring own pen.

Freya.notes: Falcon-cloak airing day — also crying-of-amber maintenance.

Njord.notes: Coastal retreat at Nóatún — the mountains were too quiet.

Skadi.notes: Ski expedition to Thrymheim — the sea was too loud.

Surtr.notes: Sword-sharpening retreat at the borders of Muspelheim.

Sigurd Fafnirsbane.notes: Recovery after the dragon-hunt — bathed in serpent-blood, allergic reaction.

Brynhild.notes: Ring of fire maintenance — annual inspection by certified Valkyrie.

Hel.notes: Underworld inventory audit — the dead must be counted.
